Context: If toggled, this decreases the distance a single nudge is moving the hologram by.
This is used to be pressed, so Up and Down on the D-Pad nudges the hologram up and down on the Z axis instead of back and forth on the X axis.
Is displayed when looking at foliage. {Button_image} revers to the button that has to be held. It plays an animation when pressed down. Division of the string is handled in code via the tag.
Pressing Filter Conflicts shows the key bindings that were cleared because of conflicting key bindings
Shown when filtering for keybinding conflicts
Resets all the button bindings to the default values
Resets the highlighted button bindings to the default value
Menu for adding and customizing map markers. Used to mark places of interests on the map

SourceString: Do you really want to clear the notes?

Context: This appears as a separate UI element in front of the controller button image in GamepadHints: `(Hold) Ⓐ` if the need to be held to trigger the action

This is used to create each line of a keybinding hint, displayed next to a controller button on the controller mappings screen, any leading or trailing whitespace is trimmed
E.g., it could be used to create two lines like this (where [X] is an image of a controller button):
[X] Jump
Hold: [X] Fly
VariableDescription:
{Variant} = `UI/ControllerMappings/HoldPrefixColon` or `UI/ControllerMappings/LongPressPrefixColon` or empty string
{Display Name} = Name of the action (e.g., Build Menu, Jump, Quick Search, etc)
